name: Aadhaar Card
description: A 12-digit individual identification number issued by UIDAI, serving as proof of identity and address anywhere in India.
application_fee: Fresh Enrolment: Free, Demographic Update: ₹50, Biometric Update: ₹100
application_steps: Locate an Enrolment Center near you.
Book an appointment online (optional but recommended).
Visit the Enrolment Center with your original documents.
Fill out the Aadhaar Enrolment Form.
Provide demographic and biometric data (fingerprints, iris scan).
Collect your Acknowledgement Slip containing the Enrolment ID (EID).
Check Aadhaar status online using the EID.
Download e-Aadhaar or wait for the physical card by post.

required_documents.name: Proof of Identity (PoI)
required_documents.purpose: To verify your legal name and identity.
required_documents.where_to_get: Passport, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving Licence

required_documents.name: Proof of Address (PoA)
required_documents.purpose: To verify your current residential address.
required_documents.where_to_get: Passport, Bank Statement, Voter ID, Ration Card

required_documents.name: Proof of Date of Birth (PoB)
required_documents.purpose: Required only if correcting or registering verified Date of Birth.

common_mistakes: Spelling mistakes in name compared to PoI document.
Not updating mobile number linked to Aadhaar.
